---
title: "Projects"
---

## Job Postings Data Analysis

- Processed large-scale job postings dataset using PySpark
- Built relational tables and executed SQL queries
- Analyzed salary trends, job roles, and industry demand

---

## Data Visualization Projects

- Created dashboards using Tableau and PowerBI
- Visualized trends on progress of various projects within department
- Presented insights to management

---

## AI Hackathon Project

- Coordinated and led the end-to-end development of a hackathon project
- Collaborated with team members to define the problem, design the solution, and divide responsibilities efficiently
- Translated technical findings into clear, concise insights for presentation to judges and stakeholders
